aboutDescription:
May 20: Workshops
May 21–22: Conference
ICM München, Munich, Germany

KotlinConf is the official Kotlin conference by JetBrains. It is a place for the community to gather and discuss all things Kotlin.

partners.name: Google
partners.description: Google's mission is to organize the world's information and make it universally accessible and useful.

partners.name: Kotlin Foundation
partners.description: The Kotlin Foundation is a non-profit company whose mission is to promote and advance the Kotlin ecosystem

partners.name: Gradle
partners.description: Develocity is the leading software solution for improving developer productivity & the developer experience. It does this by leveraging advanced build and test performance acceleration technologies.

partners.name: Uber
partners.description: Uber's mission is to reimagine the way the world moves for the better. We build platforms that connect consumers with independent providers for ridesharing and micromobility, power local delivery for restaurants and merchants, and match shippers with carriers in the freight industry. Today, our technology helps people go anywhere and get anything in over 70 countries and 15,000 cities worldwide.

partners.name: Bloomberg
partners.description: Bloomberg's 9,000+ engineers solve complex, real-world problems. Kotlin is popular among the firm's Java and the JVM community, and increasingly, it is used to write entire application stacks.

partners.name: Cirrus Labs
partners.description: Leading provider of GitHub Actions runners for macOS & Linux. Cirrus Runners offers fixed pricing and unlimited minutes, high-performance CPUs for Kotlin Multiplatform, Android & Docker builds.

partners.name: Goodnotes
partners.description: Goodnotes is the leading digital note-taking app used by millions worldwide and by professionals at thousands of companies to capture, develop, and transform ideas into action. Founded in 2011 as a digital handwriting pioneer, Goodnotes continues to set new standards for context-rich, AI-powered productivity and cross-platform collaboration for both individuals and teams. Goodnotes supports all natural human input methods, including handwriting, typing, and voice, while providing AI assistance that adapts to how people naturally think and work. Goodnotes was named Apple’s 2022 iPad App of the Year.

partners.name: Kotzilla
partners.description: Creators of Koin, the popular Kotlin dependency injection framework, Kotzilla provides debugging tools for Kotlin devs to resolve complex app issues, empowering them to develop safer, faster apps.

partners.name: Sentry
partners.description: Sentry helps every developer detect, understand, and fix broken code, fast. Using Sentry's debugging platform–that favors action over dashboards–decreases resolution time from days to minutes, resulting in freed up dev cycles and happier customers. Founded in 2008 by David Cramer and Chris Jennings as an Open Source side project, Sentry is used by over 4 million developers and 150,000 organizations, including Disney, Cloudflare, GitHub, Slack, Instacart, Atlassian, and Riot Games. Learn more at Sentry or follow Sentry on Bluesky, GitHub, Twitter, or LinkedIn.

partners.name: Xebia
partners.description: Xebia is a global leader in IT consulting, software engineering, and training. With over 25 years of experience and a team of 5,500+ professionals across 16 countries, Xebia specializes in Artificial Intelligence, Data and Cloud, Intelligent Automation, and Digital Products and Platforms. With a strong focus on engineering excellence and a people-first culture, they equip organizations to apply emerging technologies that accelerate business innovation and drive sustainable competitive advantage. Xebia leads with a responsible and human-centric approach to AI, ensuring organizations shape a better tomorrow for all.

partners.name: Moderne
partners.description: Moderne builds the tools AI coding agents use to understand codebases, find relevant code, and safely execute large-scale changes across thousands of repositories. Powered by OpenRewrite, Moderne enables fast, reliable modernization at enterprise scale.

partners.name: Kodein Koders
partners.description: Level-up your Kotlin expertise with Kodein Koders: guiding developers to master Kotlin Multiplatform through hands-on workshops to tackle real-world Android, iOS, Desktop, and Web challenges.

partners.name: Android Weekly
partners.description: Android Weekly is a free newsletter that helps you to stay cutting-edge with your Android Development.

partners.name: JVM Weekly
partners.description: From the latest updates in JVM languages like Java, Kotlin, and Scala to emerging technologies like GraalVM and Quarkus, this newsletter covers a wide range of topics that are of interest to developers and tech enthusiasts.

partners.name: Kotlin Weekly
partners.description: Kotlin Weekly is your weekly source of Kotlin news, libraries, and events going on the Kotlin world.

partners.name: Pretix
partners.description: Pretix is an all-in-one ticketing software that cares about your event—all the way. Starting with online ticketing pretix offers a cash register app, a check-in app and more. Numerous settings and extension modules allow you to tailor your pretix shop specifically to your use case. Simple, fast and flexible. Our processes are designed to make your life easier, not harder. All our products are connected to the same backend where you can see all your sales and data at one glance. As German open source software, we comply with the highest privacy standards and prioritize accessibility and stability.

partners.name: American Express
partners.description: American Express is a global payments and premium lifestyle brand powered by technology. Our colleagues around the world back our customers with differentiated products, services, and experiences that enrich lives and build business success. Find your place in Tech at Amex.

aboutBlocks.description: Have fun and mingle with the community at the biggest Kotlin party of the year!
The Golden Kodee honors outstanding contributors to the Kotlin community who share knowledge and inspire others.
